name: Flying J Travel Center #661
corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator page (egress-blocked to fetcher, confirmed via search snippet), TruckStopsAndServices, TruckMap, Yelp and Allstays agree on Flying J #661 at 4380 Nashville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 2, phone 270-586-3343, 24-hour, with CAT Scale and ~172 truck spaces.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #661
corroboration: Pilot Flying J official amenity list and TruckStopsAndServices both list a CAT Scale at Flying J #661; CAT Scale Kentucky locator lists a scale at I-65 Exit 2 Franklin (phone 270-586-3343 matches the Flying J). Co-located service, separate row from the host truck stop.

name: Keystop Truck Stop
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices, FindTruckService and Roadnow agree on Keystop Truck Stop at 4425 Nashville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 2, phone 270-586-5922, ~79 spaces / 6 fuel lanes / 3 showers, 24-hour.

name: Pilot Travel Center #438
corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator (egress-blocked, confirmed via snippet), TruckStopsAndServices, ParkAdvisor and Yelp agree on Pilot #438 at 2940 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-9544, 24-hour, CAT Scale, ~150 spaces / 9 showers.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #438
corroboration: Pilot #438 official amenity list and TruckStopsAndServices list a CAT Scale; CAT Scale Kentucky locator lists a scale at I-65 Exit 6 Franklin. Co-located service, separate row from the host truck stop.

name: Sudden Service #62 Travel Center
corroboration: Sudden Service official store-locator page, TruckStopsAndServices, TruckMap, Allstays and TruckerPath agree on Sudden Service #62 Travel Center (AMBEST, Shell fuel) at 3303 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-3248, 24-hour, ~92 spaces / 6 lanes / 4 showers. Certified scales noted (not confirmed as a branded CAT Scale, so no separate CAT Scale row created).

name: Speedco (Love's) Franklin
corroboration: Love's/Speedco official location page (Franklin #919), iExit, TruckStopsAndServices, Yelp and 4RoadService agree on Speedco at 2875 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-598-9521, truck lube/PM/tire services.

name: TA Truck Service Franklin
corroboration: TA/Petro official location page (egress-blocked, confirmed via snippet), Yelp (101 Trotters Ln), Carrier Atlas (TA Truck Service Franklin #0347) and the facility's Facebook page agree on a standalone TA truck-service shop at 101 Trotter Lane, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6. Phone left blank (not independently confirmed).

name: Pride Truck Wash - Franklin
corroboration: Yelp, TruckWashRatings, FindTruckService, Trucker Guide and Facebook agree on Pride Truck Wash at 2940 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-0116, a full tractor/trailer wash. (Prior 'G Truck Wash' reference resolved to Pride Truck Wash at the same address.)

name: Best One Fleet Service - Bowling Green
corroboration: Best One official site, FindTruckService, Michelin and Bridgestone commercial dealer locators and TruckerPath agree on Best One Fleet Service at 200 Tobacco Rd, Bowling Green 42101, phone 270-282-2108, commercial truck tires/repair with 24-hr roadside. Exit left blank (not confirmed). Distinct from the existing production 'Best-One Tire' listings on I-75.

name: Ziegler Tire - Bowling Green (Commercial)
corroboration: Ziegler Tire official commercial-location page, Michelin, Bridgestone and Firestone dealer locators and Yellow Pages agree on Ziegler Tire at 119 Ambassador Dr, Bowling Green 42101, phone 270-282-2171, commercial truck tire/fleet service. Distinct facility from the existing production 'Ziegler Tire | Lexington' (I-75) listing. Exit left blank (not confirmed).

name: Days Inn by Wyndham Franklin
corroboration: Wyndham/Days Inn official overview, TruckStopsAndServices, iExit (travelcoupons), HotelGuides and Allstays agree on Days Inn Franklin at 103 Trotter Lane, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, with free truck/RV parking. Truck-space count left blank (sources vary 5-18).

name: Ramada by Wyndham Bowling Green
corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices (I-65 Exit 22), HotelGuides and Orbitz agree on Ramada by Wyndham Bowling Green at 4767 Scottsville Rd, Bowling Green 42104, I-65 Exit 22, with free truck/bus/RV parking for guests. Phone left blank (not confirmed).

name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Northbound (Simpson County)
publish_reason: Weigh/inspection station held pending an official KYTC/KSP source with a civic street address and confirmed direction/facility identity; corroborated via aggregated truck directories only — confirm before publishing.
corroboration: CoopsAreOpen (Post 2 Franklin, I-65 northbound, located between Exit 2 Flying J and the Exit 6 truck stops), iExit and TruckStopsAndServices confirm a permanent I-65 northbound weigh station in Simpson County/Franklin. Southbound facility not independently confirmed, so only the northbound station is listed.

name: Simpson County (Franklin) Welcome Center - I-65 Northbound
publish_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed; welcome centers are day-use unless posted otherwise, so per conservative rest-area rules this is held pending confirmation of overnight legality. Direction (NB), existence and truck access are confirmed.
corroboration: Kentucky Tourism, WBKO and WTVQ confirm the new Simpson County (Franklin) Welcome Center on I-65 northbound opened October 2025 with commercial truck parking; RestAreas.org confirms NB direction near the TN line. Held (published=false) because legal overnight-parking status is not confirmed.

name: All Star Towing & Road Service (at Sudden Service #62)
publish_reason: Operator identity, current operating status and exact affiliation confirmed only via a single truck-stop directory listing; not independently corroborated. Held pending a second independent source.
corroboration: Single directory (TruckStopsAndServices) lists All Star Towing & Road Service (270-202-3331) as an on-site service at Sudden Service #62, 3303 Scottsville Rd, Franklin. Only one source, so held.

name: TA Smiths Grove
corroboration: Official TA locator page exists but returns 403 to the agent proxy (bot protection); identity/address/exit/amenities corroborated across TruckerGuide (TA #468), TruckStopsAndServices, and 4RoadService. NOTE: An older Yelp entry 'Smiths Grove Travel Center Exxon' shows CLOSED (Mar 2026) — that is the superseded prior brand; the site now operates as TA (Yelp 'TA Smiths Grove' shows open 24h, reviews through Dec 2024) at the same 605 S Main St address.

name: CAT Scale - TA Smiths Grove
corroboration: CAT Scale locator (catscale.com) returns 403 to the agent proxy; CAT Scale presence at 605 S Main St corroborated by ChamberOfCommerce, 4RoadService, and the travel-center directory listing. Listed as separate co-located service per the co-location model; host truck stop is the TA row above.

name: Park City Shell (IGA Express)
corroboration: Open/operating status confirmed via Shell official locator and Yelp (IGA Express Shell, updated Dec 2025 = active). Truck-stop amenities and ~15 truck spaces corroborated by TruckerPath, TruckStopsAndServices, and AllStays. Phone left blank (not independently confirmed).

name: Higdon's Service Center
corroboration: Active status confirmed by Yelp (Higdon's Wrecker Service updated Jun 2026; Higdon's Service Center/Chevron updated Feb 2026). Address, phone, and services (towing, flat tire repair, off-road diesel) corroborated by FindFuelStops (I-65 Exit 53 listing) and Yelp. No official website confirmed; left blank.

name: Crossroads Towing & Truck Repair
corroboration: Active status confirmed by Yelp (updated Jan 2026) and official site ctstowing.com. Address 128 W Estes Rd / Exit 53 and phone corroborated by official site and 4RoadService. NOTE: a TruckStopsAndServices entry mislabels this as 'I-65 Exit 2' — the official site and Yelp confirm Cave City Exit 53; the Exit 2 value was treated as a directory error and not used.

name: Red Roof Inn & Suites Cave City
corroboration: Identity/address confirmed by Red Roof official property page (rri825) and multiple booking sites. Semi-truck parking corroborated by Tripadvisor parking feature and Yelp reviews explicitly citing '18 wheelers... lots of truck' parking. Truck space count not published, left blank.

name: Love's Travel Stop #360
corroboration: Official Love's page returns 403 to the agent proxy; identity/address (4000 L&N Turnpike), Exit 58, phone, CAT Scale, McDonald's/Subway, and amenities corroborated across TruckStopsAndServices, FindFuelStops, and FindTruckService. Truck space count left blank because sources conflict (reported 90 / 161 / 280).

name: CAT Scale #1174 - Love's #360 Horse Cave
corroboration: CAT Scale locator returns 403 to the agent proxy; CAT Scale #1174 at Love's #360 corroborated by TruckerGuide (scale #1174), FindFuelStops, and 4RoadService. Separate co-located service row per the co-location model; host truck stop is the Love's #360 row above.

name: Love's Truck Care #360
corroboration: Love's Truck Care at #360 corroborated by TruckDown, FindTruckService (Love's Truck/Tire Care #360), and Yelp. Separate co-located service row per the co-location model (distinct from the host Love's truck stop). Phone set to the location's main number.

name: Munfordville Truck Parking (Truck Parking Club)
corroboration: Bookable lot listed on Truck Parking Club (active, Exit 65, ~6 spaces, $10/day). Address/location corroborated by CTS Towing Yelp (1786 Main St, updated Apr 2026 = active). Phone left blank (booking is through Truck Parking Club).

name: Hart County Rest Area (I-65 Northbound)
publish_reason: Existence, direction (northbound), mile marker (~59) and separate truck parking are confirmed via KYTC and news/directory sources, but LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed (never assumed from truck-space presence). No street address (mile-marker facility).
corroboration: Direction (NB, MM ~59, Hart County) and separate truck parking corroborated by WCLU Radio (2024 KYTC award), RestAreasNearMe, and the KYTC Welcome Centers/Rest Areas/Weigh Stations document. Held for unconfirmed legal overnight status.

name: Munfordville Rest Area (I-65 Southbound)
publish_reason: Existence, direction (southbound), mile marker (~60) and separate truck parking are confirmed via KYTC/directory sources, but LEGAL overnight-parking status is not independently confirmed. No street address (mile-marker facility).
corroboration: Direction (SB, MM ~60) and truck parking corroborated by ParkAdvisor, RestAreasNearMe, and the KYTC facilities document. Held for unconfirmed legal overnight status.

name: Baymont by Wyndham Cave City
publish_reason: Brand page lists free RV/bus/truck parking, but exact street address/zip could not be independently confirmed and some guest reviews cite limited parking; semi/overnight truck capacity not clearly confirmed. Held pending address and truck-parking confirmation.
corroboration: Only the Wyndham brand overview reliably describes truck parking; address not independently confirmed. Insufficient corroboration to publish.

name: Petro Stopping Center #330 (Petro Glendale)
corroboration: TA-Petro official location page (Petro Glendale, 554 W Glendale Hodgenville Rd, I-65 Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices (#330, I-65 Exit 86, 263 spaces, CAT scale, Iron Skillet, TA Truck Service, truck wash) + Find Truck Service (Petro #330, 270-369-6840) + TruckMap (zip 42740) all agree on brand, address, exit 86, 263 truck spaces, 12 diesel lanes. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

name: CAT Scale - Petro Glendale (#330)
corroboration: Petro/TA travel centers carry CAT Scales as standard; truckstopsandservices Petro #330 amenity list explicitly includes 'CAT scales', corroborated by the TA-Petro official Petro Glendale page listing scale services. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

name: TA Truck Service - Petro Glendale
corroboration: TA-Petro official Petro Glendale page + truckstopsandservices both list on-site truck service/repair with ~5 bays (oil & lube, truck repairs) at Petro #330, Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Glendale
corroboration: Blue Beacon official location listing (Glendale, KY, double bay next to Petro, Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices ('Blue Beacon Truck Wash | I-65 Exit 86') agree on brand, location and I-65 Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

name: Pilot Travel Center #48 (Glendale)
corroboration: Pilot Flying J official location page (Pilot #48, 58 Glendale Hodgenville Rd W, Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices (Pilot #48, I-65 Exit 86, 125 spaces, CAT scale, Wingfoot Truck Care, McDonald's) + Find Truck Service (270-369-7360) agree on brand, address, exit 86, 125 truck spaces, 11 diesel lanes. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #48 (Glendale)
corroboration: Pilot Flying J official location content and truckstopsandservices both list CAT Scales among the amenities for Pilot #48 at I-65 Exit 86. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

name: Wingfoot Truck Care - Pilot #48 (Glendale)
corroboration: Pilot #48 official page and truckstopsandservices both list 'Wingfoot Truck Care' as the on-site truck service/tire facility at Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

name: RaceTrac #2597 (Elizabethtown)
corroboration: RaceTrac official store page (#2597, 813 E Dixie Ave, Elizabethtown) + truckstopsandservices ('RaceTrac | I-65 Exit 91', 28 truck spaces, 6 fuel lanes, reefer plugs, 270-982-1044) + iExit (RaceTrac at I-65 Exit 91) agree on identity, address, exit 91, truck accommodations. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

name: CAT Scale - RaceTrac #2597 (Elizabethtown)
publish_reason: CAT Scale presence at a RaceTrac is atypical and could not be confirmed via the official CAT Scale locator (egress-blocked). Directory sources (truckstopsandservices, way.com, iExit) list a 'CAT scale / truck scale CAT' at this RaceTrac, but these directories may share source data; holding pending official CAT Scale locator confirmation.
corroboration: Multiple freight directories list a CAT/truck scale at RaceTrac #2597 (Exit 91), but not independently confirmable via the official CAT Scale locator; held.

name: Love's Travel Stop #716 (Elizabethtown)
corroboration: Love's official location page + Love's 2018 opening press release + truckstopsandservices + Find Truck Service agree on Love's #716, 601 S Ring Rd Elizabethtown 42701, 270-982-2600, 63 truck spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 5 showers, CAT Scale, Love's Truck Care. Access is via WK Parkway Exit 133 at the I-65 junction; exact I-65 exit number left blank (not independently confirmed). Facility serves the Elizabethtown/I-65 freight hub. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #716 (Elizabethtown)
corroboration: truckstopsandservices and Find Truck Service both explicitly list 'CAT Scales and certified scales' among amenities for Love's #716; Love's travel stops carry CAT Scales as standard. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

name: Love's Truck Care - Love's #716 (Elizabethtown)
corroboration: Yelp business listing 'Love's Truck Care, 601 S Ring Rd, Elizabethtown' + Michelin/Bridgestone commercial tire dealer locators (Love's Travel Stops, 601 Ring Rd) + truckstopsandservices (tire repair, truck repairs, 3 service bays) confirm an on-site Love's Truck Care tire/service shop. Official site egress-blocked; verified via multiple independent snippets.

name: Plaza 94 (Elizabethtown)
corroboration: AllStays truck-stop detail (Plaza 94, I-65 Exit 94, 5 truck spaces, deli, restaurant, ATM, truck wash) + iExit Exit 94 business list both place Plaza 94 at I-65 Exit 94 (US-62), 2022 N Mulberry St, Elizabethtown. Phone not confirmed (left blank). Directory sources only; official site egress-blocked.

name: Plaza 94 Truck Wash (Elizabethtown)
publish_reason: A truck wash is listed as a Plaza 94 amenity by AllStays/iExit, but the wash's brand, operating hours, attended/self-serve status, and current operational status could not be independently confirmed. Holding pending confirmation.
corroboration: AllStays and iExit both mention a truck wash at Plaza 94 (Exit 94), but no independent confirmation of brand/operational status; held.

name: Greenfield Inn & Suites Elizabethtown (I-65 Exit 94)
corroboration: Expedia/Orbitz/Travelocity property pages (Greenfield Inn & Suites Elizabethtown, KY I-65 Exit 94; formerly Wingfield Inn) consistently state free self parking plus free RV, bus, and truck parking. Address 1043 Executive Drive per Expedia; brand/OTA renaming noted. Truck parking confirmed by multiple independent OTA sources.

name: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites (I-65 Exit 94)
corroboration: Best Western brand page + HotelGuides (I-65 Exit 94, truck parking) + HotelPlanner (2014 N Mulberry St, Elizabethtown 42701) confirm identity, Exit 94 location, and truck/large-vehicle parking (outside uncovered parking for buses/boats/large vehicles). Phone left blank (not confirmed).

name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Southbound (Elizabethtown, KSP Post 3)
publish_reason: Weigh/inspection station held pending an official KYTC/KSP source with a civic street address and confirmed direction/facility identity; corroborated via aggregated truck directories only — confirm before publishing.
corroboration: TruckMap explicitly names 'Weigh Station Elizabethtown SB I-65 S' (southbound direction confirmed); coopsareopen 'Post 3 (Elizabethtown)' confirms an I-65 weigh station between Exit 86 (Pilot/Petro to the south) and Exit 105 (Pilot to the north), with NORPASS bypass (permanent fixed scale). Exact mile marker not independently confirmed (KYTC PDF egress-blocked); left blank. A northbound counterpart may exist but was not independently confirmed and is not listed.

name: Pilot Travel Center #399
corroboration: Official Pilot location page (150 Plaza Park Rd, Lebanon Junction 40150), truckstopsandservices (Pilot #399, I-65 Exit 105), findtruckservice (Pilot #399, phone 502-833-2727), and Kentucky interstate logos (Pilot at I-65 Exit 105 / KY-61) all agree on identity, exit, and city. CAT Scale, Subway, McDonald's, and 8 diesel lanes reported by multiple directories. Official brand page (loves.com/pilotflyingj.com) blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT), so identity was corroborated via independent directories.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #399, Lebanon Junction
corroboration: Multiple independent directories list CAT Scales among the amenities of Pilot #399 at I-65 Exit 105, Lebanon Junction. The official catscale.com locator was blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT); CAT Scale presence corroborated by >=2 independent directory listings.

name: Love's Travel Stop #238
corroboration: Search snippets from the official Love's #238 page, truckstopsandservices (Love's #238, I-65 Exit 116), Yelp, and RV Parky all confirm 1090 Cedar Grove Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, store #238, phone 502-543-7000, Exit 116. Official loves.com page blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT); corroborated via independent directories.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #238, Shepherdsville
corroboration: truckstopsandservices, 4RoadService, and Chamber of Commerce directory all list a CAT Scale at the Love's #238 / I-65 Exit 116 Shepherdsville location (phone 502-543-7000). Official catscale.com locator blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

name: Love's Truck Care #238
corroboration: Find Truck Service (Love's Truck Care #238, Shepherdsville, 800-655-6837), TruckDown, and NTTR Directory all confirm a Love's Truck Care heavy-duty service/tire center co-located with Love's #238 at 1090 Cedar Grove Rd, I-65 Exit 116, offering tire and mechanical services. Listed as a distinct co-located service per the co-location model.

name: Pilot Travel Center #356
corroboration: Official Pilot location page, truckstopsandservices (Pilot #356), Find Truck Service (Pilot #356, phone 502-955-5049), and TruckMap all confirm 2050 E Blue Lick Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, store #356, with a CAT Scale. Exit is corroborated as I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/Blue Lick Rd) by roadnow/iExit exit lists; one directory's 'Exit 121' label is inconsistent with the KY exit sequence and was not used. Official brand page blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #356, Shepherdsville
corroboration: truckstopsandservices and Find Truck Service both list a CAT Scale at Pilot #356, 2050 E Blue Lick Rd, I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville. Official catscale.com locator blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

name: All American Truck Wash
corroboration: Yellowpages (All American Truck Wash, 1116 Cedar Grove Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, 502-543-1911) and Find Truck Service / Allstays truck-wash directories both list a truck/trailer wash at I-65 Exit 116, 1116 Cedar Grove Rd. Name appears as 'All American Truck Wash' (yellowpages) / 'All American-Pride Truck Wash' (findtruckservice); primary name used from yellowpages.

name: Bullitt County Welcome Center (I-65 Southbound, MM 114) - truck parking
publish_reason: Direction (SB) and MM 114 confirmed by KYTC welcome-center documentation, and separate truck parking is present, but LEGAL overnight parking status is not independently confirmed (never assumed from truck-space presence). Exact street address/zip not confirmed. Held per conservative rest-area/welcome-center rules.
corroboration: KYTC Welcome Center ADA document and kentuckyrestareas.com both confirm a Bullitt County I-65 Welcome Center, southbound, mile marker 114, with separate truck/passenger parking and phone 502-543-5900. Overnight legality unconfirmed, so held.

name: I-65 Bullitt County Weigh Station (KVE/KSP)
publish_reason: Existence of an I-65 Bullitt County weigh/scale facility is asserted by directory sources, but direction (NB/SB), mile marker/exact location, and permanent-vs-mobile/inspection-only status could not be independently confirmed from KYTC/KSP. Note: the MM-114 facility is a KYTC Welcome Center, not a weigh station; the nearest confirmed permanent KSP scale (Post 3 / Elizabethtown, MM ~89.5, Hardin County) is south of this segment. Held per conservative weigh-station rules.
corroboration: coopsareopen and kentuckytruckingonline reference an I-65 weigh station in the Bullitt County/Shepherdsville area, but neither provided a confirmable direction, mile marker, or status; KSP CVE operates KY weigh stations. Insufficient to publish.

name: Days Inn by Wyndham Louisville Airport Fair & Expo Center
corroboration: Address 2905 Fern Valley Rd / Louisville 40213 confirmed by hotel's own site, Wyndham brand page, GoToLouisville (official CVB), HotelPlanner and Yelp. Free truck/bus/RV parking stated on the hotel's own marketing site and listed in the Hotels4Truckers truck-friendly directory. I-65 Exit 128 (Fern Valley Rd) confirmed via AARoads I-65 Louisville exit guide. Wyndham official page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch; details corroborated across >=2 independent sources.

name: Motel 6 Louisville, KY - Airport/Fair Expo
publish_reason: Truck/large-vehicle parking is reported only by third-party booking aggregators (ParkSleepHotels and other travel sites); the official Motel 6 property page returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch and truck-parking availability could not be independently confirmed on an official source. Identity/address (6121 Airport Hotels Blvd, Louisville 40213; phone 502-742-4722) and I-65 Exit 128 location are corroborated, but category-fit (confirmed truck parking) is not.
corroboration: Address and phone corroborated by Motel 6 property page, Yelp and GoToLouisville. Truck-parking claim appears only on aggregator/park-sleep listings and is unverified on an official source, so held.
